inv.rationale: Basic interactivity via hover effects on call-to-action buttons and fade-in animations, but lacks deeper data exploration features like filtering/drilling. Limited emotional engagement through simple transitions.
Clearly communicates the data story with relevant visualizations aligned to questions. Insights are meaningful, though data sources are vaguely cited as 'various manufacturers' without specifics.

Text is readable with appropriate font sizes and contrast. Chart clarity depends on script loading (e.g., ECharts), but structural hierarchy is well-organized. Consistent color usage enhances legibility.
Logical layout with responsive sections and balanced visual elements. Effective whitespace usage. Charts have fixed dimensions which may hinder full responsiveness on smaller screens.
Visually appealing color scheme with smooth fade-in animations. Typography is readable, but chart styling is basic. Limited complex visual enhancements beyond foundational aesthetics.
